_comment: Species: Giant Centipede (巨蜈蚣) from Renegade Immortal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Giant Centipede

canonical.appearance: Centipede 8 m long, hundred legs of spirit-iron, mandibles drip corrosive venom
canonical.size: 8 m adult, 2000 jin; ancient 30 m, 50000 jin
canonical.behavior: Subterranean predator; tunnels through stone; venom dissolves spirit-armor
canonical.habitat: Underground caverns, earth-aspected deep caves, beneath ancient battlefields
canonical.diet: underground beasts, lost miners, corpse marrow
canonical.relationships: Enemy of ant beasts; rival of web weavers
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: giant_centipede — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
